---
title: "Run HybPiper to extract Crisp101 loci"
author: "Jeremias Ivan"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y, %H:%M%p')`"

output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: show
    toc: true
    toc_float: true

params:
  # general
  codedir: "~/EucsPhylogenomics/codes/busco"
  outdir: "~/simulation"
  thread: 10
  redo: FALSE

  # input directory
  dir_fastq: ""
  fn_hybpiper_metadata: ""

  # executable
  exe_hybpiper: ""
---

## Load required libraries and functions
```{r}
source(paste0(params$codedir, "/codes/crisp101/functions.R"))

library(data.table)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
# install.packages("log4r")

# store initial system time
sys_tic <- Sys.time()

# create outdir
currentdir <- paste0(params$outdir, "/")
if (!dir.exists(currentdir)) {
  dir.create(currentdir, recursive = T)
}

# create log file
fn_log <- paste0(params$outdir, "/run_crisp101.log")
log_appender <- log4r::file_appender(fn_log, append = TRUE, layout = log4r::default_log_layout())
fn_logger <- log4r::logger(threshold = "INFO", appenders = log_appender)
if (params$redo || !file.exists(fn_log)) {
  unlink(fn_log)
  write.table(c("EucsPhylogenomics",
                "Developed by Jeremias Ivan"),
              file=fn_log, quote=F, row.names=F, col.names=F)
}

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = currentdir)
```

## Run HybPiper
```{r run-hybpiper}
# create output directory
dir_hybpiper_output <- paste0(params$outdir, "/hybpiper_run/")
if (!dir.exists(dir_hybpiper_output)) {
    dir.create(dir_hybpiper_output, recursive=T)
}

# open metadata
df_hybpiper_metadata <- data.table::fread(params$fn_hybpiper_metadata)

# iterate over samples
for (i in 1:nrow(df_hybpiper_metadata)) {
    msg <- f_hybpiper(sample=df_hybpiper_metadata$sample[i],
                      dir_sample=params$dir_fastq,
                      target_file=df_hybpiper_metadata$target_file[i],
                      data_type=df_hybpiper_metadata$data_type[i],
                      thread=params$thread,
                      outdir=dir_hybpiper_output,
                      exe_hybpiper=params$exe_hybpiper)

    log4r::info(fn_logger, msg)
}
```

## Extract DNA sequences from the original study
```{r extract-sequence-ref}
# create output directory
dir_alignment_output <- paste0(params$outdir, "/alignment/")
if (!dir.exists(dir_alignment_output)) {
    dir.create(dir_alignment_output, recursive=T)
}

# iterate over target file
for (file in unique(df_hybpiper_metadata$target_file)) {
    # open the target file
    seq <- Biostrings::readDNAStringSet(file)
    ls_locus <- sapply(names(seq), function(x) { header <- unlist(strsplit(x, split="-")); header[length(header)] })
    ls_locus <- unique(ls_locus)

    # iterate over locus
    for (locus in ls_locus) {
        # create output directory
        dir_fasta_output <- paste0(dir_alignment_output, locus, "/")
        if (!dir.exists(dir_fasta_output)) {
            dir.create(dir_fasta_output, recursive=T)
        }

        # output file
        fn_fasta <- paste0(dir_fasta_output, locus, ".fna")
        if (file.exists(fn_fasta)) {
            log4r::warn(fn_logger, paste0("File found: FASTA file for ", locus, ". Locus sequences from the target file will be appended."))
        }

        # extract sequences
        seq_locus <- seq[grepl(paste0("-",locus,"$"), names(seq))]
        names(seq_locus) <- gsub(paste0("-",locus), "", names(seq_locus))

        # save sequences
        Biostrings::writeXStringSet(seq_locus, file=fn_fasta, append=T)
    }
}
```
